test_coverage.criterion: AC-1: Sparse context (0% coverage) yields large gap, 6+ questions
test_coverage.reason: Implementation not yet complete: adaptive interview logic with sparse context handling

test_coverage.criterion: AC-2: Medium context (65% coverage) yields medium gap, 3-5 questions
test_coverage.reason: Implementation not yet complete: medium context gap assessment and question selection

test_coverage.criterion: AC-3: Rich context (90% coverage) yields small gap, 1-2 questions
test_coverage.reason: Implementation not yet complete: rich context minimal question generation

test_coverage.criterion: AC-4: Contradictory context yields need-decision with conflicts
test_coverage.reason: Implementation not yet complete: conflict detection and need-decision yield

test_coverage.criterion: AC-5: Territory map failure yields blocked with diagnostic
test_coverage.reason: Implementation not yet complete: error handling for territory map failures

test_coverage.criterion: AC-6: Each test validates question count, gap metrics, question relevance
test_coverage.reason: Implementation not yet complete: gap_analysis metadata and question relevance validation

fixture_files_created: create_fixture_sparse() - generates empty territory/memory for 0% coverage scenario
create_fixture_medium() - generates partial context for 65% coverage scenario
create_fixture_rich() - generates comprehensive context for 90% coverage scenario

decisions.choice: Use self-contained fixture functions that generate JSON files for territory/memory/issue scenarios
decisions.reason: Enables reproducible testing without external dependencies, fixtures can be version controlled

decisions.choice: Explicit fail() calls with descriptive messages about missing implementation
decisions.reason: Makes TDD RED phase clear - tests document expected behavior that doesn't exist yet
alternatives: Try to call unimplemented functions and let them fail naturally

decisions.choice: Tests specify expected coverage percentages (0%, 65%, 90%) that implementation must match
decisions.reason: Provides clear acceptance criteria for gap assessment accuracy
alternatives: Use ranges instead of specific values
